review_title: Firebird 2.51 to MS SQL 2016 with 30GB data and hundreds of procedures and triggers!
author: Kai L.
pros: Program is easy to use and one can run own conversions between the export and import steps if one wants to. The sales team is very knowledgeable and one can tailor the price to match the needs easily. The technical help if needed is very good and prompt. I can recommend the tool without any doubts. It will save time, money and nerves :^)
cons: The conversion does take hours and maybe the program could use all the cores of modern PC more efficiently?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool
author: Felipe C.
pros: Ease of Use - The tool is very easy to setup and use. The Interface Is very intuitive . The connection setup to source and target DB is also very easy to setup. Performance - Performance of the Tool is very optimized. We were able to move 7 mil records from SQL server and PG SQL server within 60 - 70 mins. This gave a good throughput.
cons: It would be helpful if the tool also gave us a way to map the Source and Target Tables along with an option to Filter the data from the Source based on some criteria if we have only specific set of tables.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ispirer nGLFly Wizard 10
description: The experience with Ispirer has been exceptional. They are very cordial, prompt and professional. They readily attempt to check and eventually include your requirements in the tool. I experienced this in case of screen and SQL handling capabilities in COBOL to C# auto re-factoring.Overall, I found the team very well equipped with the needed technical knowledge.
author: Deepak A.
pros: The most important thing about this tool is it comes to help you in a requirement less in demand - COBOL to C# auto refactor. There aren't many tools in this space. This one works well with mainframe and AS/400 COBOL - within its current limits.
cons: Not that I liked LEAST about this; however, it currently processes only business logic in COBOL. It doesn't take care of user interaction and reporting. Also, currently it is not equipped with SQL statements processing capabilities, e. g. - CURSOR processing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Ispirer SQLWays
description: Technical Support are very helpful to guide.
author: Yenny L.
pros: Ispirer SQLWays was easy to use & support team are very responsive
cons: No report of import results, some of our stored procedures and functions were not able to convert correctly. Oracle sequences also not converted correctly. License period may be too short for big data migration
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: COBOL to Java conversion
description: We conducted a project for a major Japanese supplier to convert COBOL batch programs of about 400K lines to Java.The conversion was performed using the Ispirer tool, and the project proceeded with the policy of manually addressing the missing parts.Before the project started, whole conversion was performed in advance and problems were identified preliminarily, major problems were addressed by customizing the tool in advance.Without Ispirer's tool, it would have been impossible to complete the project within the eight-month time frame.Using Ispirer tool to convert COBOL to Java this time, we will never be converting COBOL to Java from scratch for similar projects in the future.I believe we will continue to use Ispirer's tools for similar projects in the future.
author: Yoshiro S.
pros: 1. Ispirer Java library for COBOLThe tool converts to Java based on the Java library that Ispirer delivers with the tool for COBOL specific data types such as PICTURE type and other COBOL specific circumstances, so the accuracy of conversion is high.2. Extension of the tool (which is called customization)For example, in this project, the user was accessing Oracle using a special library that allows SQL access to the database to be coded as if it were a regular text file.But when rewriting to Java, we needed to rewrite it as JDBC access. This was necessary and we had some tool customizaions on this.This was very helpful because the tool was able to cover a large portion of this issue by customizing the tool.Ispirer was very helpful in consulting the conversion specifications for such customization, and was very quick and detailed in its response.
cons: I think it is better to say that it is not a demerit but a point to be noted on the basic premise that a tool cannot convert 100% perfectly.In the case of conversion from COBOL to Java, performance problems may occur in the converted Java. This is largely due to the structure of individual programs, so it has to be handled manually.The secret of success may be to verify the performance at an early stage of a project.Other than this, I have no particular complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Best and most intelligent tool in the category
description: Ispirer is the best tool we found in the Database migration category. It does not just blindly do the pattern based migrations and rather applies good intelligence in doing so. With the awesome support from Ispirer team, we were able to customize some rules to our liking and it delivered perfect results. Using the flexibility offered by the tool, we were able to migrate databases with thousands of objects, with good speed through CLI options. The best part is that once the configurations are tried in test environments, we could simply breeze through our Production migrations without any extra efforts. The proactiveness of the Ispirer sales team and responsiveness of technical team made it a perfect DB migration experience. One thing which can be improved is speed of data migration, when BLOBs are present with high data volume. In general, for migration of couple of hundreds GBs of data (without strict downtime requirements) tool can be of help.
author: Sameer K.
pros: DB Objects conversion Easy to Install CLI Options Parallel Processing Value for money
cons: Data Diffs can be added through some dashboard/reporting add on
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Firebird to SQL DB Migration
description: We needed to migrate our client’s current database which was Firebird to SQL Server (new DB). While the client’s landscape was complicated ( with roughly 250 tables and 200+ stored procedures and triggers) with given table structure and customized triggers and schemas, iSpirer utility helped to achieve our objective in a hassle-free way. We did evaluated lot of other utilities available but iSpirer was the only one which supported all triggers and schemas. It helped us to save a lot of manual efforts (migration of each SQL objects) and was a cost effective solution in the end. The team and support functions of iSpirer were very responsive to all our queries and collaboration with them was really a seamless experience. I would highly recommend their product (utility) for any database migration related projects. Thanking again Ispirer team for all the support !
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Covers all elements during migrations including complex triggers and schemas
cons: The utility was quite up to mark and was useful, no downside.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review of Ispirer Data Migration from SQL Server to mySQL
description: from a time, cost and convenience, nothing comes close, really!
author: Peter H.
pros: The ease of setup and simplicity of use makes choosing this product really easy.
cons: more detailed error messages during data migration will be welcome
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Database Migration from SAP SQL ANYWHERE TO MSSQL 2017
author: Edvin C.
pros: Ease to use It generates a lot of objects(scripts) the you needed to do manually. Very good communication with customer support.
cons: Results still require some manual work.Migration of data is slow.But in rest it is a very good that saves you a lot of time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best tool for Firebird to MSSQL conversions.
author: Cobus C.
pros: Great conversion of object code. Flexible run-time options. Ability to run DDL creation from generated scripts afterwards.
cons: Data transfer can be somewhat slow for big tables. Should make better use of multi-core servers.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Product, Excellent Support
description: I found this product online when I was faced with converting a client SQL Server Database to Oracle DB. When Oracle's migration tools failed miserably and with no support and very little to go on via online articles, I went searching for an alternative. Finding Ispirer's product, I downloaded the free trial, installed it and within 5 or 10 minutes I had already done a trial run. After speaking with Ispirer to get a license that would handle the full database, all I to do was solve my Oracle connectivity issues. With that in place, I ran the conversion and "bingo": all done. Very pleased with this product. Kudos to Ispirer for their brilliant design & implementation and a big thanks to their customer support people!
author: Dave A.
pros: Gets the job done with a minimum of setup. Easy to use, consistent and reliable. Very intelligently designed and well implemented. A joy to use.
cons: No complaints at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software
author: Marcella C.
pros: The software is easy to use, It was used for a migration from ORACLE to MySQL and it worked beautifully. We had an issue with converting decimal digit, which was fixed by changing the regedit environment variable NLS_LANG to AMERICAN_AMERICA.WE8MSWIN1252. everything else went smoothly. Thank you for your assistance and supply.
cons: Based on the problem encountered, I might suggest including a check on the mentioned variable before launching the object conversion.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: We have used Ispirer in a big migration project from Informix to MS SQL Server
author: Allan A.
pros: We had 1 or 2 minor issues with it but overall, it just works. All our data was successfully migrated across but even better, most of the business logic in the DB (ie stored procedures and functions) were migrated successfully with some minor adjustments that we need to make to handle input and output.
cons: The handling of input and output to the various stored procedures and functions could be more versatile. Perhaps an option to select how these functions are called could be baked into the product. But overall it was something that we could manage ourselves quite easily so not much of an issue.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent tool: Sybase IQ -> MS SQL Server
description: We were migrating off of Sybase IQ infrastructure to MS SQL Server and looking for a tool that would help with this daunting task. Ispirer MnMTK fit the bill very well. There are very few tools out there that I could find and this one works very well. We will look to use this tool in additional migrations in the future.
author: James T.
pros: This tool is designed very well and easy to use. The Support and sales staff are very helpful in the evaluation process.
cons: No negatives that I witnessed. Others comment on the time it takes but I do not think that is unexpected based on the size of tables.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Migration from DB2/udb databases toward MS SQL Server
description: Ease of migration from one DBMS to another. Easy to use. and most important, we can see the script , so if needed we can adapt or make easy correction.

pros: Ease of use of the gui installation and application. Migration of data properly with good data type on target db. Creation of .sh script to make the ''load'' on the target, enable us to rerun ( or ) modify scripts for our specific need ( if requirer ). Good service fromm ISPirer Note: We did not transfert any ''LOB'' data type field. But i have used in the past for migration from db2/udb to Oracle ( with BLOB field ) and it worked perfectly.
cons: You have to know exactly the size of you database and contents in order to requierer the proper license.

review_title: Great support, great tool - a real timesaver.
description: Saves a lot of precious time.

cons: Results still require some manual work, some source-db specific functions/constants are not considered in resulting scripts (causing manual review)

review_title: Migrating Microsoft SQL Server to Oracle
author: Daniel K.
pros: - Easy to use Wizard - Covers all Database Elements - Great customer support - detailed log - generates SQL-Scripts including .sh-starter scripts, so modifications are easily possible
cons: The tool needed a lot of time for creating all scripts, but not realy overly problematic

review_title: Database migration
description: Ispirer is a great tool for migrating databases. We used it to migrate large and complex database from SQL Server, Sybase to PostgreSQL. The migration process was smooth and easy, and the Ispirer support team was very helpful in answering our questions. We would definitely recommend Ispirer to anyone looking for a reliable and easy to use database migration tool.

pros: Ease of use Ability to customize rules to fit the migration needs Very good customer support
cons: No post migration reporting feature available in the tool
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Db2 to Postgres conversion for procedure, functions and triggers
description: Overall it was good experience using this tool and all our procedures, functions and triggers got converted successfully.
author: Subhash K.
pros: Ispirer has pre-assessment tool which really helps to get the exact idea about the conversion and the costing. The conversion tool is very easy to install and use. We had to do some customization and some changes in the tool as some of the procedures were not getting converted properly. Ispirer team was very helpful and providing fixes time to time.
cons: It was all good and i don't have anything to add here.

review_title: Ispirer tool review on converting Oracle pl/sql to Teradata USP
author: Netaji A.
pros: 1. Tool is very user friendly to operate and installation is quick and easy2. Customization is easy to meet the project requirements without affect the other functionalities 3. Good for simple code conversions
cons: 1. Complex functionalities (Ex. handling multiple cursors, variable data types, batch processing and dynamic SQLs and updates) are not addressed in code conversion which lead to more manual efforts2. Support team was expecting equivalent solution in Teradata for Oracle functions which were not converted properly in the beginning
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: PostgreSQL migration success
author: Kiki H.
pros: Our migration from MSSQL server to PostgreSQL was facilitated by ISpirer. We are very happy and content with the support we got from ISpirer. We had some SQL Server specific constructions in our database, like the use of HiearchyIDs for instance, that simply do not exist in the PostgreSQL world. But ISpirer helped us work around this, by writing a customization that, in this case, leverages the use of the PostgreSQL function ltree. Another thing we encountered is that the migration was initially quite slow. It turned out we were not using the native mssql drivers in our DSN. After specific instructions from ISpirer the duration of a migration was reduced from 8 hours to 20-30 minutes. Because we have hundreds of databases that need to be migrated, automating the whole process was key for us. ISpirer helped us achieve just that, through their excellent tooling, customizations, and support.
cons: The migration was quite slow when using the wrong ODBC driver. It could have been more clear that that would be the effect when choosing a DSN.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ispirer software and customer support was remarkable
description: Very good experience. The company was responsive to our questions and issues and the software functioned well.
author: Simon L.
pros: The conversion software simplified our Oracle to SQL project and reduced the amount of work we had to do. The company provided exceptional customer service and felt like an extension of our team.
cons: The software was easy to install and Ispirer provide customizations where the tool was initially unable to convert some of our stored procedures.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
